name: zerodelay
description: Browser extension that keeps YouTube live streams in real time.
author: João Gustavo França <joao@solitus.com.br>

scripts.lint:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.run:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext run --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest
